items.claim: Costa is physically strong enough to prevent Kasa from holding him down.
items.quote: I don't see him holding Costa down. Costa is really physical.

items.claim: Kasa is capable of threatening with submissions from his back.
items.quote: Kasa will be throwing up submissions off off his back.

items.claim: Costa's boxing ability has shown significant improvement recently.
items.quote: And his boxing just looks really really good lately.

items.claim: Ryan Gonda possesses significant punching power.
items.quote: it looks like Ryan's got some punching power.

items.claim: Zack Reese demonstrates high-level kicking ability.
items.quote: He has good kicks. He definitely kicks hard.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida maintains a measured, precise, and calculated striking style.
items.quote: he's very measured, very calculated, precise

items.claim: Caesar Almeida becomes vulnerable when opponents engage in wild, aggressive striking exchanges.
items.quote: he's shown when guys do do wild [ __ ] he becomes a little vulnerable.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida possesses a significant advantage in high-level combat sports experience compared to his opponent.
items.quote: I think Cesar made to be able to use that experience and all that fighting experience
